description: linode_profile_token_list envelope: count and the metadata-only proto PersonalAccessToken elements (not the Linode data/page/pages/results page). The element models no secret field at all, so the list cannot leak a token secret (the runtime DiscardUnknown decode drops the API's token value; TestLinodeProfileTokensToolDropsSecret exercises that path). expiry is a present timestamp, gating the optional-string path. Pagination does not echo a filter, so filter is omitted.
